creator: kensmith@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Sorry for the delay on this.  I fixed the 6.3 schedule over the weekend. 
For now there is no todo list.  At the moment there aren't any huge 
issues that would affect the release, just "normal" misc. bugfixing 
activities and that sort of thing.  If that changes I'll put up a 
proper todo list.
